title: Massive Mushroom Morsels Russian Cabbage Borscht
description: A hearty and flavorful Russian dish featuring sautéed mushrooms, tangy cabbage, and a hint of salsa. This crowd-pleaser is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Shred the cabbage and set it aside.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start browning, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it's translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the tomato sauce, salsa, apple cider vinegar (if using), and sugar (if using).
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
While the mixture is cooking, prepare the bamboo steamer by filling the bottom with water and bringing it to a boil.
Place the shredded cabbage in the bamboo steamer inserts and place them in the steamer.
Cover the steamer with a lid and steam the cabbage for 10-12 minutes, or until it's tender.
Serve the cabbage in bowls and spoon the mushroom mixture over the top.
